    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActionCallback
     
    ActionFactory
    this class provides static methods to ease the creation of action lists.
    ActionList
     
    ActionPlayer
     
    Animation
     
    AnimationCallback
     
    AnimationState
     
    AnimationStep
    boardifier.model.Animation.AnimationStep is a simple wrapper to represent a step of an boardifier.model.Animation.Animation In case of boardifier.model.Animation.MoveAnimation, data will contain 2D/3D coordinates of the next position In case of a LookAnimation, data will contain some parameters to modify the visual aspect.
    AnimationTypes
     
    BackgroundElement
     
    Board
     
    ClassicBoardLook
    ClassicBoardLook is a chess like board, with optional coordinate system to show, using A, B, C for columns and 1, 2, ... for rows.

    ContainerLook

    abstract class that describes an element of the game, in the largest sense.
